codeReview.summary: The libc-boundary-headers feature successfully extracts and organizes public headers into ixland-libc boundary. All expected headers exist in correct locations with proper include guards, naming conventions, and clean separation from internal implementation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Include guards follow consistent patterns: IOX_FILENAME_H for iox/ headers, _LINUX_FILENAME_H for linux/ headers, _IXLAND_FILENAME_H for standard headers (pwd.h, grp.h).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: grep -h '#ifndef' ixland-libc/include/iox/*.h ixland-libc/include/linux/*.h ixland-libc/include/*.h shows consistent guard naming

sharedStateObservations.observation: Naming conventions strictly followed: iox_ prefix for functions, IOX_ prefix for macros/constants, iox_lowercase_t for types.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: All public headers use iox_ function prefix as documented in AGENTS.md naming conventions

sharedStateObservations.observation: 17 public headers located in ixland-libc/include/: 4 iox/ headers, 10 linux/ headers, 2 standard headers (pwd.h, grp.h), 1 sys/ header.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: find ixland-libc/include -name '*.h' | wc -l shows 17 public headers

sharedStateObservations.observation: 15 internal headers remain in ixland-system/ maintaining clean separation between public API and implementation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Internal headers in kernel/, fs/, runtime/, drivers/ subdirectories not exposed publicly

sharedStateObservations.observation: CMake install() properly exports headers with install(DIRECTORY ... FILES_MATCHING PATTERN '*.h').
sharedStateObservations.evidence: ixland-libc/CMakeLists.txt:75-83 shows install commands for public headers

summary: PASS: Feature libc-boundary-headers is complete. All 6 validation assertions (VAL-LIBC-001 through VAL-LIBC-006) are fulfilled. 17 public headers exist in ixland-libc/include/ with proper include guards, naming conventions, and Doxygen documentation. 15 internal headers remain in ixland-system/. No circular includes. CMake install() works correctly. Clean separation achieved between public API and internal implementation.
